description: LeadConnector/HighLevel provides CRM, messaging, calendar, payments, workflow, and related business automation features for customer management and marketing operations. Its platform supports account-level integrations and AI access to account data and tools.
summary: LeadConnector exposes a REST API at https://services.leadconnectorhq.com authenticated by OAuth 2.0 access tokens or Private Integration Tokens, plus a protected MCP server at https://services.leadconnectorhq.com/mcp/chatgpt using bearer auth.
